content: Just as intrinsic curiosity bonuses (from ICM/RND) reward curious RL agents for exploring unvisited, surprising state memory in episodic memory, LangGraph can be augmented with an intrinsic curiosity reward that incentivizes agents to explore under-visited nodes and untested edge connections in the graph structure, rather than just following pre-defined prompt workflows. This creates self-improving LangGraph workflows that autonomously discover novel, useful reasoning paths that their human designers did not explicitly map out.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
